headline: Xcel Energy (XEL) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.5925 per Share
summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) is included among the 15 Best Nuclear Power Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) is a major US electricity and natural gas company with operations in 8 Western and Midwestern states. On May 21, Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.5925 per […]
